summary: Sprint 7 (FINAL) passes all 6 required criteria. Build/typecheck 0; suite 3686 green (+8). renderFleetView groups by FactRecord.subject (one section/agent: label+summary+round+confidence+count); header+section round from bundle.rounds (FactRecord has no round field); empty/null reader → graceful 'no recent fleet run' (no throw); over-long value truncated to one line + routed via sendSafe (verbatim never reaches transport); non-whitelisted /fleet denied with id-echo + injected reader NEVER called; shared renderFleetView feeds BOTH /fleet and streamFleetView. TYPE-ONLY imports verified: compiled dist/telegram/fleet-view.js has ZERO runtime coupling to fleet/synthesis or better-sqlite3 (erased at compile). package.json unchanged; diff confined to src/telegram/.
typeOnlyCouplingVerified: dist/telegram/fleet-view.js has zero runtime references to fleet/synthesis, state/facts, or better-sqlite3
